title: pharbitis falkioides
intro: Pharbitis falkioides, also known as Blue Moon Flower or Blue Star Creeper, is a flowering plant in the morning glory family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Pharbitis falkioides has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress due to its calming effects, and also has been used to treat menstrual cramps and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Pharbitis falkioides include infusions, tinctures, and dried flowers that can be used in teas or as a topical application.
